blended.narrative: Hudson Bay Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.4 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,569 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Wednesday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
Thursday: 7" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
